front: Describe the concept of volume of distribution and its clinical implications.
back: Vd = amount of drug in body / plasma concentration. Low Vd (<0.6 L/kg) = stays in plasma. High Vd (>1 L/kg) = distributes to tissues. Vd helps calculate loading dose: Loading dose = Vd x Cp(target). Aspirin Vd ~0.2 L/kg; chloroquine Vd ~200 L/kg.
